# AUTH_PERSIST_ERROR

CloudKit JS 1.0+

```
const String AUTH_PERSIST_ERROR;
```

## [See Also](/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.CKError/AUTH_PERSIST_ERROR#see-also)

### [Constants](/documentation/CloudKitJS/CloudKit.CKError/AUTH_PERSIST_ERROR#Constants)

[`ACCESS_DENIED`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/access_denied)You don’t have permission to access the endpoint, record, zone, or database.[`ATOMIC_ERROR`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/atomic_error)An atomic batch operation failed.[`AUTHENTICATION_FAILED`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/authentication_failed)Authentication was rejected.[`AUTHENTICATION_REQUIRED`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/authentication_required)The request requires authentication but none was provided.[`BAD_REQUEST`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/bad_request)The request was not valid.[`CONFIGURATION_ERROR`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/configuration_error)CloudKit JS configuration error. For example, no containers are configured.[`CONFLICT`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/conflict)The `recordChangeTag` value expired. (Retry the request with the latest tag.)[`EXISTS`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/exists)The resource that you attempted to create already exists.[`INTERNAL_ERROR`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/internal_error)An internal error occurred.[`INVALID_ARGUMENTS`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/invalid_arguments)The parameters you provided for this method are invalid.[`NETWORK_ERROR`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/network_error)A network error occurred, such as a connection time out.[`NOT_FOUND`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/not_found)The resource was not found.[`QUOTA_EXCEEDED`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/quota_exceeded)If accessing the public database, you exceeded the app’s quota. If accessing the private database, you exceeded the user’s iCloud quota.[`SERVICE_UNAVAILABLE`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/service_unavailable)The CloudKit service could not be reached.[`SHARE_UI_TIMEOUT`](/documentation/cloudkitjs/cloudkit.ckerror/share_ui_timeout)The share UI failed to load and timed out.
